title: DrArora Texture Pack
description: This texture pack is designed for players who enjoy PvP, SMP, and survival while keeping the classic vanilla feel of Minecraft.
body:
This texture pack is built for players who want a clean, competitive, and performance-friendly experience across PvP, SMP, and survival — all while keeping the classic vanilla look of Minecraft.

It enhances key elements like tools, armor, blocks, and the UI to make gameplay smoother and more visually clear without changing the original style of the game. Whether you're fighting in PvP arenas, grinding on SMP servers, or exploring in survival worlds, this pack provides sharper visuals, better readability, and an overall improved vanilla experience.

Features

⚔️ PvP-Optimized Items – Clearer swords, tools, armor, and icons

🌿 Vanilla-Friendly Look – Improved textures that stay true to Minecraft

🧭 SMP & Survival Ready – Enhanced ores, blocks, and UI visibility

🎯 Clean UI & Crosshair – Better clarity for combat and navigation

🚀 Performance-Friendly – Lightweight and smooth on all setups
